mapper.select: select * from nx_ocr_task where nx_ocr_task_id = #{taskId} limit 1
mapper.update: update nx_ocr_task set `nx_ocr_task_completed_orders` = ( select count(*) from nx_department_orders where nx_do_ocr_task_id = #{taskId} and nx_do_status = 0 ), `nx_ocr_task_pending_orders` = ( select count(*) from nx_department_orders where nx_do_ocr_task_id = #{taskId} and nx_do_status = -2 ), `nx_ocr_task_status` = case when ( select count(*) from nx_department_orders where nx_do_ocr_task_id = #{taskId} and nx_do_status = -2 ) = 0 then 1 when ( select count(*) from nx_department_orders where nx_do_ocr_task_id = #{taskId} and nx_do_status = 0 ) > 0 then 2 else 0 end where nx_ocr_task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_ocr_task where nx_ocr_task_id in
#{id}
